'''yafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nvr|nvr]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nvr|nvr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yafate|yafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafatesher|yafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafatesherĂ«m|yafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafatero|yafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafateshĂ«|yafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafateshĂ«m|yafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafatero|gokiyafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafateshĂ«|gokiyafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafateshĂ«m|gokiyafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafankerom|goyafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafankeshĂ«|goyafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafankeshĂ«m|goyafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafankeya|goyafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafaterom|yafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafatemu|yafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafateya|yafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafaterom|gokiyafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafatemu|gokiyafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafateya|gokiyafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafafate|yafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafafatesher|yafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafafatesherĂ«m|yafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafafatero|yafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafafateshĂ«|yafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafafateshĂ«m|yafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafafatero|gokiyafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafafateshĂ«|gokiyafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafafateshĂ«m|gokiyafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafafankerom|goyafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafafankeshĂ«|goyafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafafankeshĂ«m|goyafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafafankeya|goyafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafafaterom|yafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafafatemu|yafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafafateya|yafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafafaterom|gokiyafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafafatemu|gokiyafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafafateya|gokiyafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠfĂŠte|yĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠfĂŠtesher|yĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠfĂŠtero|yĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠfĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠfĂŠteya|yĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠfĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠfĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafafte|yafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafaftesher|yafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafaftesherĂ«m|yafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafaftero|yafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafafteshĂ«|yafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafafteshĂ«m|yafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafaftero|gokiyafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafafteshĂ«|gokiyafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafafteshĂ«m|gokiyafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafafnkerom|goyafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafafnkeshĂ«|goyafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafafnkeshĂ«m|goyafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafafnkeya|goyafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafafterom|yafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafaftemu|yafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafafteya|yafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafafterom|gokiyafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafaftemu|gokiyafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafafteya|gokiyafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
